FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Permafrost Thaw
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Warming temperatures have caused the permafrost beneath your settlement to thaw, exposing ground that hasn't seen the sun in centuries. The newly accessible earth could be farmed or mined — a rare opportunity in these frozen lands.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Clear the thawed ground for farming. Fresh food is precious here.
Dig into the exposed deposits. There could be ore down there.
Use the thawed area cautiously — some for farming, some for mining.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Thaw Farmland
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Workers clear the newly exposed ground and plant hardy crops. In this frozen landscape, any arable land is precious. The settlement's food production is permanently improved.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Thaw Mining
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The thawed ground reveals mineral deposits previously locked beneath frozen earth. Miners eagerly exploit the new veins, permanently improving the settlement's extraction capabilities.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Cautious Expansion
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: You divide the thawed land between farming and mining operations. Neither reaches its full potential, but the balanced approach improves both food and mineral output permanently.
